verses.1: Iqtaraba lilnnasi hisabuhum wahum fee ghaflatin muAAridoona
verses.2: Ma yateehim min thikrin min rabbihim muhdathin illa istamaAAoohu wahum yalAAaboona
verses.3: Lahiyatan quloobuhum waasarroo alnnajwa allatheena thalamoo hal hatha illa basharun mithlukum afatatoona alssihra waantum tubsiroona
verses.4: Qala rabbee yaAAlamu alqawla fee alssamai waalardi wahuwa alssameeAAu alAAaleemu
verses.5: Bal qaloo adghathu ahlamin bali iftarahu bal huwa shaAAirun falyatina biayatin kama orsila alawwaloona
verses.6: Ma amanat qablahum min qaryatin ahlaknaha afahum yuminoona
verses.7: Wama arsalna qablaka illa rijalan noohee ilayhim faisaloo ahla alththikri in kuntum la taAAlamoona
verses.8: Wama jaAAalnahum jasadan la yakuloona alttaAAama wama kanoo khalideena
verses.9: Thumma sadaqnahumu alwaAAda faanjaynahum waman nashao waahlakna almusrifeena
verses.10: Laqad anzalna ilaykum kitaban feehi thikrukum afala taAAqiloona
verses.11: Wakam qasamna min qaryatin kanat thalimatan waanshana baAAdaha qawman akhareena
verses.12: Falamma ahassoo basana itha hum minha yarkudoona
verses.13: La tarkudoo wairjiAAoo ila ma otriftum feehi wamasakinikum laAAallakum tusaloona
verses.14: Qaloo ya waylana inna kunna thalimeena
verses.15: Fama zalat tilka daAAwahum hatta jaAAalnahum haseedan khamideena
verses.16: Wama khalaqna alssamaa waalarda wama baynahuma laAAibeena
verses.17: Law aradna an nattakhitha lahwan laittakhathnahu min ladunna in kunna faAAileena
verses.18: Bal naqthifu bialhaqqi AAala albatili fayadmaghuhu faitha huwa zahiqun walakumu alwaylu mimma tasifoona
verses.19: Walahu man fee alssamawati waalardi waman AAindahu la yastakbiroona AAan AAibadatihi wala yastahsiroona
verses.21: Ami ittakhathoo alihatan mina alardi hum yunshiroona
verses.22: Law kana feehima alihatun illa Allahu lafasadata fasubhana Allahi rabbi alAAarshi AAamma yasifoona
verses.23: La yusalu AAamma yafAAalu wahum yusaloona
verses.24: Ami ittakhathoo min doonihi alihatan qul hatoo burhanakum hatha thikru man maAAiya wathikru man qablee bal aktharuhum la yaAAlamoona alhaqqa fahum muAAridoona
verses.25: Wama arsalna min qablika min rasoolin illa noohee ilayhi annahu la ilaha illa ana faoAAbudooni
verses.26: Waqaloo ittakhatha alrrahmanu waladan subhanahu bal AAibadun mukramoona
verses.27: La yasbiqoonahu bialqawli wahum biamrihi yaAAmaloona
verses.28: YaAAlamu ma bayna aydeehim wama khalfahum wala yashfaAAoona illa limani irtada wahum min khashyatihi mushfiqoona
verses.29: Waman yaqul minhum innee ilahun min doonihi fathalika najzeehi jahannama kathalika najzee alththalimeena
verses.30: Awalam yara allatheena kafaroo anna alssamawati waalarda kanata ratqan fafataqnahuma wajaAAalna mina almai kulla shayin hayyin afala yuminoona
verses.31: WajaAAalna fee alardi rawasiya an tameeda bihim wajaAAalna feeha fijajan subulan laAAallahum yahtadoona
verses.32: WajaAAalna alssamaa saqfan mahfoothan wahum AAan ayatiha muAAridoona
verses.33: Wahuwa allathee khalaqa allayla waalnnahara waalshshamsa waalqamara kullun fee falakin yasbahoona
verses.34: Wama jaAAalna libasharin min qablika alkhulda afain mitta fahumu alkhalidoona
verses.35: Kullu nafsin thaiqatu almawti wanablookum bialshsharri waalkhayri fitnatan wailayna turjaAAoona
verses.36: Waitha raaka allatheena kafaroo in yattakhithoonaka illa huzuwan ahatha allathee yathkuru alihatakum wahum bithikri alrrahmani hum kafiroona
verses.37: Khuliqa alinsanu min AAajalin saoreekum ayatee fala tastaAAjiloona
verses.38: Wayaqooloona mata hatha alwaAAdu in kuntum sadiqeena
verses.39: Law yaAAlamu allatheena kafaroo heena la yakuffoona AAan wujoohihimu alnnara wala AAan thuhoorihim wala hum yunsaroona
verses.40: Bal tateehim baghtatan fatabhatuhum fala yastateeAAoona raddaha wala hum yuntharoona
verses.41: Walaqadi istuhzia birusulin min qablika fahaqa biallatheena sakhiroo minhum ma kanoo bihi yastahzioona
verses.42: Qul man yaklaokum biallayli waalnnahari mina alrrahmani bal hum AAan thikri rabbihim muAAridoona
verses.43: Am lahum alihatun tamnaAAuhum min doonina la yastateeAAoona nasra anfusihim wala hum minna yushaboona
verses.44: Bal mattaAAna haolai waabaahum hatta tala AAalayhimu alAAumuru afala yarawna anna natee alarda nanqusuha min atrafiha afahumu alghaliboona
verses.45: Qul innama onthirukum bialwahyi wala yasmaAAu alssummu aldduAAaa itha ma yuntharoona
verses.46: Walain massathum nafhatun min AAathabi rabbika layaqoolunna ya waylana inna kunna thalimeena
verses.47: WanadaAAu almawazeena alqista liyawmi alqiyamati fala tuthlamu nafsun shayan wain kana mithqala habbatin min khardalin atayna biha wakafa bina hasibeena
verses.48: Walaqad atayna moosa waharoona alfurqana wadiyaan wathikran lilmuttaqeena
verses.49: Allatheena yakhshawna rabbahum bialghaybi wahum mina alssaAAati mushfiqoona
verses.50: Wahatha thikrun mubarakun anzalnahu afaantum lahu munkiroona
verses.51: Walaqad atayna ibraheema rushdahu min qablu wakunna bihi AAalimeena
verses.52: Ith qala liabeehi waqawmihi ma hathihi alttamatheelu allatee antum laha AAakifoona
verses.54: Qala laqad kuntum antum waabaokum fee dalalin mubeenin
verses.55: Qaloo ajitana bialhaqqi am anta mina allaAAibeena
verses.56: Qala bal rabbukum rabbu alssamawati waalardi allathee fatarahunna waana AAala thalikum mina alshshahideena
verses.57: WataAllahi laakeedanna asnamakum baAAda an tuwalloo mudbireena
verses.58: FajaAAalahum juthathan illa kabeeran lahum laAAallahum ilayhi yarjiAAoona
verses.59: Qaloo man faAAala hatha bialihatina innahu lamina alththalimeena
verses.60: Qaloo samiAAna fatan yathkuruhum yuqalu lahu ibraheemu
verses.61: Qaloo fatoo bihi AAala aAAyuni alnnasi laAAallahum yashhadoona
verses.62: Qaloo aanta faAAalta hatha bialihatina ya ibraheemu
verses.63: Qala bal faAAalahu kabeeruhum hatha faisaloohum in kanoo yantiqoona
verses.64: FarajaAAoo ila anfusihim faqaloo innakum antumu alththalimoona
verses.65: Thumma nukisoo AAala ruoosihim laqad AAalimta ma haolai yantiqoona
verses.66: Qala afataAAbudoona min dooni Allahi ma la yanfaAAukum shayan wala yadurrukum
verses.67: Offin lakum walima taAAbudoona min dooni Allahi afala taAAqiloona
verses.68: Qaloo harriqoohu waonsuroo alihatakum in kuntum faAAileena
verses.69: Qulna ya naru koonee bardan wasalaman AAala ibraheema
verses.71: Wanajjaynahu walootan ila alardi allatee barakna feeha lilAAalameena
verses.72: Wawahabna lahu ishaqa wayaAAqooba nafilatan wakullan jaAAalna saliheena
verses.73: WajaAAalnahum aimmatan yahdoona biamrina waawhayna ilayhim fiAAla alkhayrati waiqama alssalati waeetaa alzzakati wakanoo lana AAabideena
verses.74: Walootan ataynahu hukman waAAilman wanajjaynahu mina alqaryati allatee kanat taAAmalu alkhabaitha innahum kanoo qawma sawin fasiqeena
verses.75: Waadkhalnahu fee rahmatina innahu mina alssaliheena
verses.76: Wanoohan ith nada min qablu faistajabna lahu fanajjaynahu waahlahu mina alkarbi alAAatheemi
verses.77: Wanasarnahu mina alqawmi allatheena kaththaboo biayatina innahum kanoo qawma sawin faaghraqnahum ajmaAAeena
verses.78: Wadawooda wasulaymana ith yahkumani fee alharthi ith nafashat feehi ghanamu alqawmi wakunna lihukmihim shahideena
verses.79: Fafahhamnaha sulaymana wakullan atayna hukman waAAilman wasakhkharna maAAa dawooda aljibala yusabbihna waalttayra wakunna faAAileena
verses.80: WaAAallamnahu sanAAata laboosin lakum lituhsinakum min basikum fahal antum shakiroona
verses.81: Walisulaymana alrreeha AAasifatan tajree biamrihi ila alardi allatee barakna feeha wakunna bikulli shayin AAalimeena
verses.82: Wamina alshshayateeni man yaghoosoona lahu wayaAAmaloona AAamalan doona thalika wakunna lahum hafitheena
verses.83: Waayyooba ith nada rabbahu annee massaniya alddurru waanta arhamu alrrahimeena
verses.84: Faistajabna lahu fakashafna ma bihi min durrin waataynahu ahlahu wamithlahum maAAahum rahmatan min AAindina wathikra lilAAabideena
verses.85: WaismaAAeela waidreesa watha alkifli kullun mina alssabireena
verses.86: Waadkhalnahum fee rahmatina innahum mina alssaliheena
verses.87: Watha alnnooni ith thahaba mughadiban fathanna an lan naqdira AAalayhi fanada fee alththulumati an la ilaha illa anta subhanaka innee kuntu mina alththalimeena
verses.88: Faistajabna lahu wanajjaynahu mina alghammi wakathalika nunjee almumineena
verses.89: Wazakariyya ith nada rabbahu rabbi la tatharnee fardan waanta khayru alwaritheena
verses.90: Faistajabna lahu wawahabna lahu yahya waaslahna lahu zawjahu innahum kanoo yusariAAoona fee alkhayrati wayadAAoonana raghaban warahaban wakanoo lana khashiAAeena
verses.91: Waallatee ahsanat farjaha fanafakhna feeha min roohina wajaAAalnaha waibnaha ayatan lilAAalameena
verses.92: Inna hathihi ommatukum ommatan wahidatan waana rabbukum faoAAbudooni
verses.93: WataqattaAAoo amrahum baynahum kullun ilayna rajiAAoona
verses.94: Faman yaAAmal mina alssalihati wahuwa muminun fala kufrana lisaAAyihi wainna lahu katiboona
verses.95: Waharamun AAala qaryatin ahlaknaha annahum la yarjiAAoona
verses.96: Hatta itha futihat yajooju wamajooju wahum min kulli hadabin yansiloona
verses.97: Waiqtaraba alwaAAdu alhaqqu faitha hiya shakhisatun absaru allatheena kafaroo ya waylana qad kunna fee ghaflatin min hatha bal kunna thalimeena
verses.98: Innakum wama taAAbudoona min dooni Allahi hasabu jahannama antum laha waridoona
verses.99: Law kana haolai alihatan ma waradooha wakullun feeha khalidoona
verses.100: Lahum feeha zafeerun wahum feeha la yasmaAAoona
verses.101: Inna allatheena sabaqat lahum minna alhusna olaika AAanha mubAAadoona
verses.102: La yasmaAAoona haseesaha wahum fee ma ishtahat anfusuhum khalidoona
verses.103: La yahzunuhumu alfazaAAu alakbaru watatalaqqahumu almalaikatu hatha yawmukumu allathee kuntum tooAAadoona
verses.104: Yawma natwee alssamaa katayyi alssijlli lilkutubi kama badana awwala khalqin nuAAeeduhu waAAdan AAalayna inna kunna faAAileena
verses.105: Walaqad katabna fee alzzaboori min baAAdi alththikri anna alarda yarithuha AAibadiya alssalihoona
verses.106: Inna fee hatha labalaghan liqawmin AAabideena
verses.108: Qul innama yooha ilayya annama ilahukum ilahun wahidun fahal antum muslimoona
verses.109: Fain tawallaw faqul athantukum AAala sawain wain adree aqareebun am baAAeedun ma tooAAadoona
verses.110: Innahu yaAAlamu aljahra mina alqawli wayaAAlamu ma taktumoona
verses.111: Wain adree laAAallahu fitnatun lakum wamataAAun ila heenin
verses.112: Qala rabbi ohkum bialhaqqi warabbuna alrrahmanu almustaAAanu AAala ma tasifoona
